zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery於1465年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，她的父親Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy60歲，母親Lady Catherine Maxwell55歲。她於1459年與Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie在蘇格蘭艾斯爾坎寧安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1533年2月15日在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年68歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾文寧吉爾文寧 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery于1465年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，她的父亲Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy60岁，母亲Lady Catherine Maxwell55岁。她于1459年与Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie在苏格兰艾斯爾坎寧安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1533年2月15日在苏格兰艾丁波享年68岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾文寧吉爾文寧 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine

meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery was born in 1465, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, was 60 and her mother, Lady Catherine Maxwell, was 55. She married Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie in 1459, in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 February 1533, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery est née en 1465, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Maxwell, avait 55 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie en 1459, à Cunningham, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 février 1533, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie nel 1459, nel Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomeryが1465年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedyは60歳，母Lady Catherine Maxwellは55歳であった。1459年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクウニンガムでAlexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1533年2月15日にスコットランドエディンブルグで68歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルウィニングキルウィニング チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North: 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬윈잉 킬윈잉 처르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery(이)가 1465년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine Maxwell(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 1459년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 쿤잉함에서 Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 2월 15일 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬윈잉 킬윈잉 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery nasceu em 1465, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Maxwell, tinha 55 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie em 1459, em Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North: килвиннинг чурчярд, килвиннинг, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery родилась в 1465 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gilbert Kennedy 1st Lord Kennedy было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Maxwell, 55. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie в 1459 г. в местности куннингхам, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 февраля 1533 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности килвиннинг чурчярд, килвиннинг, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Murió el 15 de febrero de 1533, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
